params.name: Disquisitiones Arithmeticae
params.description:
On Apr 13, 1801 AD, the renowned German mathematician Gauss published his groundbreaking mathematical treatise.
The work "Disquisitiones Arithmeticae" marks the pioneering contributions of Gauss to the field of number theory, showcasing his profound mathematical theories and thoughts. "Disquisitiones Arithmeticae" establishes a new framework for the theory of integers based on rigorous mathematical logic and systems. In the book, Gauss explores the fundamental properties and operational rules …
